records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, long time no see, Teach.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, long time no see, Teach.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, long time no see, Teach.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow! This place is all shiny. Don't tell me you set this up for me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow! This place is all shiny. Don't tell me you set this up for me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow! This place is all shiny. Don't tell me you set this up for me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ehehe, I'm kinda touched. Maybe my affection score for you just ticked up a bit?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Ehehe, I'm kinda touched. Maybe my affection score for you just ticked up a bit?

records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Well, not that it matters. Because my affection for you is already maxed out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha! Just kiddin', just kiddin'!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha! Just kiddin', just kiddin'!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha! Just kiddin', just kiddin'!

records.m_Talk_ENG: C'mon, between us, what's there to be shy about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: C'mon, between us, what's there to be shy about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: C'mon, between us, what's there to be shy about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So then. What Artifact do you want me to dig up for you this time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So then. What Artifact do you want me to dig up for you this time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So then. What Artifact do you want me to dig up for you this time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever it is, leave it to me! I've been reborn as the Treasure¬ñj[Hunter who'll steal your heart!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever it is, leave it to me! I've been reborn as the Treasure¬ñj[Hunter who'll steal your heart!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever it is, leave it to me! I've been reborn as the Treasure¬ñj[Hunter who'll steal your heart!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aha! So this is the new request form, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aha! So this is the new request form, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aha! So this is the new request form, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's see here...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's see here...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's see here...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Teach, you didn't hand me the wrong paper, did you? This isn't a request form, it's a lifetime contract.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Teach, you didn't hand me the wrong paper, did you? This isn't a request form, it's a lifetime contract.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Teach, you didn't hand me the wrong paper, did you? This isn't a request form, it's a lifetime contract.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah! Don't tell me! Teach...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah! Don't tell me! Teach...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah! Don't tell me! Teach...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're asking me to make a contract and become a <color=#ffd34c>magical girl</color>?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're asking me to make a contract and become a <color=#ffd34c>magical girl</color>?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're asking me to make a contract and become a <color=#ffd34c>magical girl</color>?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I mean... I'm still young at heart, so if it's you askin'...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I mean... I'm still young at heart, so if it's you askin'...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I mean... I'm still young at heart, so if it's you askin'...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Pfft!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Pfft!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Pfft!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahahahahaha! Teach, you've gotten downright adorable while I was gone, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahahahahaha! Teach, you've gotten downright adorable while I was gone, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahahahahaha! Teach, you've gotten downright adorable while I was gone, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What kinda contract is this between you and me, anyway?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What kinda contract is this between you and me, anyway?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What kinda contract is this between you and me, anyway?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't we already make the real lifetime contract back in the club room?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't we already make the real lifetime contract back in the club room?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't we already make the real lifetime contract back in the club room?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you my future plans back then, remember? That I'd stick by your side, day and night.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you my future plans back then, remember? That I'd stick by your side, day and night.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you my future plans back then, remember? That I'd stick by your side, day and night.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So no matter what trials come our way, I'll always be with you. Always!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So no matter what trials come our way, I'll always be with you. Always!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So no matter what trials come our way, I'll always be with you. Always!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I reckon the other kids, each helpin' you in their own way, feel the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I reckon the other kids, each helpin' you in their own way, feel the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I reckon the other kids, each helpin' you in their own way, feel the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But me, I'll be the one right here, guarding your side.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But me, I'll be the one right here, guarding your side.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But me, I'll be the one right here, guarding your side.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-ahem...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-ahem...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-ahem...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, since it's been a while, how about we make a new contract for old times' sake?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, since it's been a while, how about we make a new contract for old times' sake?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, since it's been a while, how about we make a new contract for old times' sake?

records.m_Talk_DEU: But in return, grant me one wish, Teach.
